note: Watchlist of VTuber / streamer channels Eggie wants to track for tag pool growth. The weekly channel-watchlist scheduled task pulls each channel's latest videos via VidIQ and extracts vocabulary not yet in tags.json. Add channels by appending to the list — handle, channelId, or YouTube URL all work.
